mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employee_shifts(employee_id, shift_id, shift_date) VALUES(#{employeeId}, #{shiftId}, #{shiftDate})

INSERT INTO employee_shifts(employee_id, shift_date, shift_type, on_duty, remark) VALUES(#{employeeId}, #{shiftDate}, #{shiftType}, #{onDuty}, #{remark}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE shift_type = VALUES(shift_type), on_duty = VALUES(on_duty), remark = VALUES(remark)
mapper.select: SELECT id, employee_id as employeeId, shift_date as workDate, shift_type as shiftType, on_duty as onDuty, remark FROM employee_shifts WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND shift_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}
SELECT id, employee_id as employeeId, shift_date as workDate, shift_type as shiftType, on_duty as onDuty, remark FROM employee_shifts WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND shift_date = #{shiftDate}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT employee_id) FROM employee_shifts WHERE shift_date = CURRENT_DATE AND on_duty = 1;
